extraction.one_line_summary: DE MARCHI Alessandro attacked solo on the final climb, refusing to arrive with RESTREPO for a sprint finish, winning his first race in three years.
tactical_patterns: PINOT Thibaut went in break 2:33 down overall to claim virtual race lead, but GC group closed 19-second gap without declaring gaps.
DE MARCHI Alessandro attacked early on final climb specifically to avoid sprint finish with RESTREPO, recognizing tactical sprint disadvantage.
Education First team hit front with mass during rain shower, suggesting aggressive weather-based positioning to animate GC race.
VALVERDE Alejandro and Lotto-Jumbo stayed engaged in final GC skirmish despite no gaps declared, testing YATES Simon without committing fully.

rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: positioned 2:33 down but comfortable riding away from peloton to claim virtual lead, suggesting climbing form returning
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: positive: first win in three years after admitting he questioned whether he'd lost feeling for winning, mental barrier broken
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: red jersey held but required team support when Education First accelerated in rain, not controlling race solo
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: actively positioned in final GC skirmish but unable to force time gaps despite terrain and conditions
rider_signals.ROLLAND Pierre: neutral: animated mountains classification competition but beaten by MOLARD Rudy at intermediate point
